Video.summary: Do you ever wish you could see all the wackiest weather from around the world, without moving a muscle or lifting a finger? Your wish is our command here on a brand new episode of Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Somewhere Over the Rainbow

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Somewhere Over the Rainbow
Extreme Weather Countdown | Somewhere Over the Rainbow
Extreme Weather Countdown | Somewhere Over the Rainbow

Video.summary: Float through a flood, battle a blizzard, and twist around in a tornado on Extreme Weather Countdown.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain On My Parade

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain On My Parade
Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain On My Parade
Extreme Weather Countdown | Rain On My Parade

Video.summary: Welcome to Extreme Weather Countdown, where floods, blizzards, and lightning are the name of the game.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Trampolines to the Wind

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Trampolines to the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Trampolines to the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Trampolines to the Wind

Video.summary: We have a brand new lineup bursting at the seams with some of the craziest climate events caught on camera.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Snowed In

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Snowed In
Extreme Weather Countdown | Snowed In
Extreme Weather Countdown | Snowed In

Video.summary: From the intense to the unusual to the just plain wacky, Extreme Weather Countdown is home to everything the elements have to offer, and it's time for an all-new episode. We'll work our way through snow, wind, fog, lightning, and more, so fasten your seatbelts and let's get started.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain
Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain
Extreme Weather Countdown | Free Rain

Video.summary: Floods give way to rainbows and tornadoes twist into hailstorms on today’s intense Extreme Weather Countdown!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | In Cold Flood

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | In Cold Flood
Extreme Weather Countdown | In Cold Flood
Extreme Weather Countdown | In Cold Flood

Video.summary: Today’s forecast: thunder, lightning, and high winds. Oh, and lots of tornadoes.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?
Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?
Extreme Weather Countdown | Who Wants to Play Twister?

Video.summary: Pipes freeze, snow falls, and people slip on the aftermath in today’s ice cold Extreme Weather Countdown
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Cold as Ice

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Cold as Ice

Extreme Weather Countdown | Cold as Ice

Video.summary: Are you ready to have dust devils, tornadoes, floods, and thunderstorms flashing before your eyes? You'd better be, because you're watching Extreme Weather Countdown, where we waste no time filling your screen with the most intense weather events caught on camera.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather
Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather
Extreme Weather Countdown | Under the Weather

Video.summary: Tanalian Aviation battles winter weather to ferry ice climbers onto the Knik Glacier.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Ice Climbers

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Ice Climbers
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Ice Climbers
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Ice Climbers

Video.summary: Pilot Peter Rosendahl combats gail force wind while taxiing a group of hunters to a floating lodge.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Risky Business

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Risky Business
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Risky Business
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Risky Business

Video.summary: Rough seas have a couple of surfers turning to Island Air for an adventure of a life time.
Video.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up

Image.alt: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up
Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots | Surf's Up

Video.summary: On a rare day off, Josiah and his friends white water raft where few have gone before - on top of the massive Knik Glacier.
